mapper.select:
SELECT m.member_id AS memberId, m.login_id AS loginId, m2.nickname, TO_CHAR(o.order_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS settlementMonth, p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, p.acc_type AS placeType, p.region AS placeRegion, p.commission_rate AS commissionRate,
NVL(SUM(o.real_total_amount), 0) AS totalGmv, NVL(SUM(ROUND(o.real_total_amount * p.commission_rate / 100, 0)), 0) AS totalCommission, NVL(SUM(cu.platform_discount_amount), 0) AS totalCouponPlatform, NVL(SUM(cu.partner_discount_amount), 0) AS totalCouponPartner, NVL(SUM(o.real_total_amount) - SUM(ROUND(o.real_total_amount * p.commission_rate / 100, 0)) - SUM(NVL(cu.partner_discount_amount, 0)), 0) AS totalNetPayout,
COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orderCount, NVL(stl.status, 'PENDING') AS settlementStatus, stl.settlement_id AS settlementId FROM member1 m JOIN member2 m2 ON m.member_id = m2.member_id JOIN place p ON p.partner_id = m.member_id JOIN orders o ON o.place_id = p.place_id LEFT JOIN coupon_usage cu ON cu.order_id = o.order_id AND cu.partner_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN settlement stl ON stl.place_id = p.place_id AND TO_CHAR(stl.settlement_month, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(o.order_date, 'YYYY-MM') WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} AND o.status IN ('결제완료', '체크아웃완료')
AND TO_CHAR(o.order_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{settlementMonth}
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.login_id, m2.nickname, TO_CHAR(o.order_date, 'YYYY-MM'), p.place_id, p.place_name, p.acc_type, p.region, p.commission_rate, stl.status, stl.settlement_id ORDER BY p.place_id

SELECT o.order_id, od.reservation_id, o.order_date, m2.nickname AS guestNickname, o.total_amount, o.coupon_discount, o.point_discount, o.real_total_amount, NVL(cu.platform_discount_amount, 0) AS couponPlatformAmt, NVL(cu.partner_discount_amount, 0) AS couponPartnerAmt, p.commission_rate, ROUND(o.real_total_amount * p.commission_rate / 100) AS commissionAmount, (o.real_total_amount - ROUND(o.real_total_amount * p.commission_rate / 100) - NVL(cu.partner_discount_amount, 0)) AS partnerPayout, pay.status AS paymentStatus, o.status AS orderStatus
FROM orders o JOIN order_detail od ON od.order_id = o.order_id JOIN member1 m ON m.member_id = o.member_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m.member_id JOIN place p ON p.place_id = o.place_id LEFT JOIN coupon_usage cu ON cu.order_id = o.order_id AND cu.partner_id = p.partner_id LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.order_id = o.order_id WHERE p.place_id = #{placeId} AND TO_CHAR(o.order_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{settlementMonth} AND o.status IN ('결제완료', '체크아웃완료') ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO settlement stl USING (SELECT #{placeId} AS place_id, TO_DATE(#{settlementMonth} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS settlement_month FROM DUAL) src ON (stl.place_id = src.place_id AND TRUNC(stl.settlement_month, 'MM') = src.settlement_month) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET stl.status = 'APPROVED', stl.approved_at = SYSDATE, stl.approved_by = #{adminId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (settlement_id, place_id, settlement_month, status, approved_at, approved_by) VALUES (settlement_seq.NEXTVAL, #{placeId}, TO_DATE(#{settlementMonth} || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'APPROVED', SYSDATE, #{adminId})
